name: Linguistics
description: Understand, speak, and read additional languages including alien communication patterns.

name: Psychology
description: Understand and influence the minds of sentient beings. Useful for interrogation, negotiation, and treating psychological trauma.

name: Sophontology
description: Deep expertise in the cognition, culture, and behaviour of all known sapient species including aliens.

name: Zoology
description: Identify, track, and understand animal life. Predict behaviour and assess threat levels.

name: Pathology
description: Identify diseases, infections, and biological anomalies. Determine cause of death.

name: Exobiology
description: Expert knowledge of alien life forms — their biology, threat profiles, weaknesses, and evolutionary pressures.

name: Botany
description: Identify plants and fungi, assess edibility/toxicity, manage botanical specimens.

name: Field Medicine
description: Provide advanced medical care in the field. Stabilise critical patients, treat wounds, diagnose illness.

name: Surgery
description: Perform complex surgical procedures. Treat severe wounds, remove foreign bodies, perform organ work.

name: Geology
description: Analyse rock formations, identify minerals, assess geological stability and hazards.

name: Ecology
description: Understand ecosystems, environmental interactions, and the impact of human/alien activity on a biosphere.

name: Planetology
description: Comprehensive expertise in planetary science — atmosphere, geology, biology, and habitability assessment.

name: Industrial Equipment
description: Operate heavy machinery: loaders, excavators, drilling rigs, cargo handling systems. Preloaded for Teamsters.

name: Asteroid Mining
description: Extract resources from asteroids and planetoids. Navigate hazardous low-gravity environments.

name: Robotics
description: Build, modify, and repair robotic systems. Program autonomous behaviour.

name: Jury-Rigging
description: Improvise repairs using whatever is on hand. Get things working when they shouldn't.

name: Mechanical Repair
description: Properly diagnose and repair mechanical systems: engines, life support, airlocks, vehicles.

name: Engineering
description: Design, build, and overhaul major mechanical and structural systems. Applies to ships, stations, and installations.

name: Chemistry
description: Identify chemicals, synthesise compounds, neutralise hazards, and assess chemical risks.

name: Pharmacology
description: Formulate drugs and medicines. Identify, synthesise, and counter toxins and pharmaceuticals.

name: Computers
description: Operate, configure, and troubleshoot computer systems. Preloaded for Androids.

name: Hacking
description: Infiltrate secured computer systems, override locks, extract data, disable security measures.

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Create, modify, and reason with AI systems. Includes understanding rogue AI behaviour like Monarch.

name: Zero-G
description: Move and work effectively in zero-gravity environments. Preloaded for Teamsters.

name: Piloting
description: Fly and manoeuvre spacecraft. Applies to Ship Thrusters stat checks.

name: Mathematics
description: Advanced mathematical problem-solving. Navigation, engineering calculations, statistical analysis. Preloaded for Androids.

name: Physics
description: Apply advanced physics: orbital mechanics, materials science, energy systems.

name: Hyperspace
description: Navigate and understand hyperspace. Calculate jump trajectories, diagnose warp anomalies.

name: Art
description: Create and interpret artistic works across media. May apply to communication with alien intelligences.

name: Mysticism
description: Understand occult traditions, religious practices, and esoteric knowledge across species.

name: Xenoesotericism
description: Deep knowledge of alien spiritual systems, cosmic horror entities, and unknowable forces.

name: Archaeology
description: Identify, excavate, and interpret ancient artefacts and ruins from any species.

name: Theology
description: Understand religious systems, spiritual practices, and the role of faith in various cultures.

name: Wilderness Survival
description: Survive in hostile environments: find food/water, navigate terrain, build shelter, avoid natural hazards.

name: Military Training
description: Formal military discipline, tactics, and weapons handling. Preloaded for Marines.

name: Firearms
description: Expert weapons handling: advanced shooting techniques, weapon maintenance, tactical use.

name: Command
description: Lead troops and crew under pressure. Coordinate complex operations. Rally panicking allies.

name: Rimwise
description: Street smarts and survival knowledge from the Rim — the lawless frontier. Know who to trust and how to stay alive.

name: Hand-to-Hand Combat
description: Expert unarmed and melee combat. Applies to unarmed attacks and close-quarters fighting.

name: Athletics
description: Running, climbing, swimming, jumping — physical feats of endurance and agility. Preloaded for Marines.

name: Explosives
description: Set, disarm, and assess explosive devices. Demolition, breaching, and controlled detonations.

name: Cybernetics
description: Install, modify, and repair cybernetic implants and augmentations. Interface biological systems with machinery.
